name: Q.U.I.R.K.™
short_description: Q.U.I.R.K. is a multiplayer, cross-platform game for PC, macOS, and HTC Vive! Play Sportsball, our new fast-paced game-type, and build with an expanded collection of colorful blocks and props that will have your players bouncing higher, running faster, and having more fun than ever!
detailed_description:
Q.U.I.R.K. Fall Expansion is Live: Sportsball, Avatar Customization, more colorful blocks, props and art!

The Q.U.I.R.K.Fall Expansion is live! We're currently distributing Q.U.I.R.K. via Steam's Early Access community, and should be considered as a video game in the late Alpha phase of development. You could experience some strange behaviors and exciting or unexpected features in this build.

We're looking forward to hearing your feedback and bug reports, so make sure to send a note to Support@ugenworld.com if you run into something especially tricky, or if you'd like some more intensive help getting around any tech issues we're not aware of yet.


About the Game

  • Our Fall content update is now LIVE! Avatar customizations, New sportsball game type, TONS of new blocks, and SPOOKY PROPS!



    Welcome to Q.U.I.R.K.
    Q.U.I.R.K. is a game that PC and Mac gamers can play together, and it's compatible with the HTC Vive! Join coop matches against AI or go straight-up PVP! Directed by user feedback and fueled by user generated content, regular updates will give players more of the things they enjoy, and less of the things that suck.

    Currently, you can build and play multi-player death matches, capture the flag, sandbox, and sportsball games with an ever-expanding list of special weapons and in-game tools like:
    • Jet Packs
    • Bazookas
    • Stun Guns
    • Grappling Plunger
    • A wide variety of blocks and special art assets with a host of colors and functions

    Prior to launch, future updates will allow you to build, share, and play new Q.U.I.R.K. game types like:
    • King of the Hill
    • Sports Ball Arena
    • Tower Defense
    • And the many, many game types that will be suggested by our community.
